description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a tall, upright structure with a predominantly dark red and black color scheme. The front panel displays a control area with a joystick, several buttons, and a coin slot, all set against a background decorated with heart motifs and graffiti-style text. The marquee at the top reads 'HEART CATCH' in bold, playful lettering, and the side panels are adorned with large, outlined heart graphics and the logo 'ICOSPHERE GAMES.' The cabinet's back is plain black with ventilation grilles and no visible artwork. The overall design is visually striking, with a romantic and playful theme, making it suitable for entertainment venues or urban arcades. The materials appear to be a combination of painted wood or MDF, plastic, and metal components, typical of classic arcade machines.
description: A tall, upright arcade game cabinet with heart-themed graphics, graffiti-style text, and a control panel featuring a joystick, buttons, and a coin slot. The cabinet is mainly dark red and black, with bold artwork and a playful, romantic theme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with joystick, buttons, coin slot, and the 'HEART CATCH' marquee above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting large heart graphics, the 'HEART CATCH' text, and the ICOSPHERE GAMES logo.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black surface with ventilation grilles and no decorative artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with heart graphics and the 'HEART CATCH' text, but mirrored.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and several buttons arranged in a cluster, plus a visible coin slot.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features 'HEART CATCH' in bold, graffiti-style white text on a dark background, matching the romantic heart theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large outlined heart graphics in black on a dark red background, with 'HEART CATCH' text and the ICOSPHERE GAMES logo.
